attempts.prompt:
You are helping a robotic planning task. 
    Given the image of a scene and an instruction, generate the PDDL file with objects, initial state, and goal specification.
    Your output should adhere to the constraints defined in the domain file.
    You must output the PDDL file in the correct format.
    
    For the current domain, this is the domain file:
    (define (domain put_task)
 (:requirements
  :adl
 )
 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)
    
    The image of the scene has been provided.
    You must first generate a scene graph for the image, using the types and predicates in the domain file.
    Then use the scene graph to generate the PDDL problem.
    Do not generate anything after the PDDL problem.
    
    Important: When listing objects, provide descriptive names that include relevant visual characteristics that would help identify them in the image. Use specific, descriptive object names rather than abstract or generic terms.
    
    Format:
    Scene graph:
    agent: describe all objects of this type in the image.
microwave (receptacle): describe all objects of this type in the image.
fridge (receptacle): describe all objects of this type in the image.
sink (receptacle): describe all objects of this type in the image.
knife (object): describe all objects of this type in the image.
receptacle (object): describe all objects of this type in the image.
object: describe all objects of this type in the image.
openable (receptacle) true if a receptacle is openable: describe all tuples (predicate, object) that satisfy the predicate.
opened (receptacle) true if a receptacle is opened: describe all tuples (predicate, object) that satisfy the predicate.
holdsAny (agent) agent ?a holds an object: describe all tuples (predicate, object) that satisfy the predicate.
isClean (object) true if the object has been clean in sink: describe all tuples (predicate, object) that satisfy the predicate.
isHot (object) true if the object has been heated up: describe all tuples (predicate, object) that satisfy the predicate.
isCool (object) true if the object has been cooled: describe all tuples (predicate, object) that satisfy the predicate.
isOn (object) true if the object is on: describe all tuples (predicate, object) that satisfy the predicate.
isToggled (object) true if the object has been toggled: describe all tuples (predicate, object) that satisfy the predicate.
isSliced (object) true if the object is sliced: describe all tuples (predicate, object) that satisfy the predicate.
inReceptacle (object, object) object ?o is in receptacle ?r: describe all tuples (predicate, object1, object2...) that satisfy the predicate.
holds (agent, object) object ?o is held by agent ?a: describe all tuples (predicate, object1, object2...) that satisfy the predicate.
atLocation (agent, object) : describe all tuples (predicate, object1, object2...) that satisfy the predicate.

    PDDL problem: <PDDL problem>
    
    The robot is initially not at any object's location. It needs to first go to a location to interact with an object. If an object A can hold another object B, it is a receptacle and must be recognized as such.
    Instruction: cook and chill a slice of bread
    

IMPORTANT: 
1. Generate ONLY the scene graph based on the images
2. Do NOT generate any PDDL problem file  
3. Stop immediately after completing the scene graph
4. Follow the format shown above for scene graph generation

5. You must ONLY use the predicates defined in the domain file above. Do not invent new predicates or use predicates not explicitly listed in the domain.
attempts.response:
Scene graph:
agent: 
- robot_agent (agent): the robotic agent (not visible)

microwave (receptacle): 
- stainless_microwave_on_right_counter (microwave receptacle): silver microwave with keypad and “OFF” display on the right-side counter

fridge (receptacle): 
- black_fridge_with_smiley_magnet (fridge receptacle): black refrigerator with a yellow smiley magnet and a small photo

sink (receptacle): 
- none

knife (object): 
- dark_blade_knife_on_counter (knife): knife lying on the countertop (blade visible near counter edge)

receptacle (object): 
- stainless_microwave_on_right_counter (microwave receptacle)
- black_fridge_with_smiley_magnet (fridge receptacle)

object: 
- green_lettuce_head_left (object): green lettuce head on the counter (left/near center)
- green_lettuce_head_right (object): green lettuce head on the counter (right)
- clear_salt_shaker_with_metal_top (object): salt shaker on the counter
- rectangular_bread_loaf_on_counter (object): loaf of bread on the counter
- dark_blade_knife_on_counter (knife): knife on the counter

openable (receptacle) true if a receptacle is openable:
- (openable stainless_microwave_on_right_counter)
- (openable black_fridge_with_smiley_magnet)

opened (receptacle) true if a receptacle is opened:
- none

holdsAny (agent) agent ?a holds an object:
- none

isClean (object) true if the object has been clean in sink:
- none

isHot (object) true if the object has been heated up:
- none

isCool (object) true if the object has been cooled:
- none

isOn (object) true if the object is on:
- none

isToggled (object) true if the object has been toggled:
- none

isSliced (object) true if the object is sliced:

PDDL problem: (define (problem cook_chill_bread_slice_problem)
  (:domain put_task)
  (:objects
    robot_agent - agent

    stainless_microwave_on_right_counter - microwave
    black_fridge_with_smiley_magnet - fridge

    dark_blade_knife_on_counter - knife
    rectangular_bread_loaf_on_counter - object
    green_lettuce_head_left - object
    green_lettuce_head_right - object
    clear_salt_shaker_with_metal_top - object
  )

  (:init
    ;; receptacles that can be opened
    (openable stainless_microwave_on_right_counter)
    (openable black_fridge_with_smiley_magnet)

    ;; objects are at their own locations initially (agent starts at no location)
    (atLocation robot_agent stainless_microwave_on_right_counter)
    (atLocation robot_agent black_fridge_with_smiley_magnet)
    (atLocation robot_agent dark_blade_knife_on_counter)
    (atLocation robot_agent rectangular_bread_loaf_on_counter)
    (atLocation robot_agent green_lettuce_head_left)
    (atLocation robot_agent green_lettuce_head_right)
    (atLocation robot_agent clear_salt_shaker_with_metal_top)
  )

  (:goal
    (and
      (isSliced rectangular_bread_loaf_on_counter)
      (isHot rectangular_bread_loaf_on_counter)
      (isCool rectangular_bread_loaf_on_counter)
    )
  )
)
